creator: mspitzer@gmail.com
text:
portmaster www/ikiwiki on a new jail fails, ran 'perl-after-upgrade -f' and there were no changes to the installed modules and it still failed to build. Here is the output for portmaster for ikiwiki build:

===>>> Continuing 'make config' dependency check for www/ikiwiki
===>>> Recursive 'make config' check complete for www/ikiwiki

===>>> Starting build for www/ikiwiki <<<===

===>>> Starting check for build dependencies
===>>> Gathering dependency list for www/ikiwiki from ports
===>>> Starting dependency check
===>>> Dependency check complete for www/ikiwiki

===>  Cleaning for ikiwiki-3.02

===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
===>  Found saved configuration for ikiwiki-3.02
===>  Extracting for ikiwiki-3.02
=> MD5 Checksum OK for ikiwiki_3.02.tar.gz.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for ikiwiki_3.02.tar.gz.
===>   ikiwiki-3.02 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.8.9 - found
===>  Patching for ikiwiki-3.02
===>   ikiwiki-3.02 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.8.9 - found
===>   ikiwiki-3.02 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/mach/HTML/Parser.pm - found
===>   ikiwiki-3.02 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/mach/Locale/gettext.pm - found
===>   ikiwiki-3.02 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/CGI/FormBuilder.pm - found
===>   ikiwiki-3.02 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/CGI/Session.pm - found
===>   ikiwiki-3.02 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/Date/Parse.pm - found
===>   ikiwiki-3.02 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/HTML/Scrubber.pm - found
===>   ikiwiki-3.02 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/HTML/Template.pm - found
===>   ikiwiki-3.02 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/Mail/Sendmail.pm - found
===>   ikiwiki-3.02 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/Text/Markdown.pm - found
===>   ikiwiki-3.02 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/URI.pm - found

===>  Configuring for ikiwiki-3.02
Writing Makefile for IkiWiki
===>  Building for ikiwiki-3.02
./pm_filter: not found
Filter command './pm_filter /usr/local 3.02 /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9' failed for IkiWiki/Plugin/sparkline.pm at /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.8.9/ExtUtils/Install.pm line 1124.
gmake: *** [pm_to_blib] Error 127
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/www/ikiwiki.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/www/ikiwiki.

===>>> make failed for www/ikiwiki
===>>> Aborting update

How-To-Repeat: portmaster www/ikiwiki

or
 cd /usr/ports/www/ikiwiki
 make 
 make install
